parameters.content:
## Quarterly Planning Assistant

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Feed context: last quarter actuals, this quarter proposed themes, constraints
3. LLM produces a structured planning brief: recommended bets, resource allocation, risks
4. Approval gate before sharing with leadership
5. Trigger manually at quarter start

parameters.jsCode:
const { brief: b, meta: m } = $input.first().json;
const betLines = (b.recommended_bets||[]).map(bt =>
  `  ${bt.theme} (${bt.estimated_capacity_pct}% capacity, confidence: ${bt.confidence})\n    Initiatives: ${bt.recommended_initiatives.join(', ')}\n    Rationale: ${bt.rationale}`
).join('\n\n');
const riskLines = (b.key_risks||[]).map(r => `  [${r.severity.toUpperCase()}] ${r.risk}\n    Mitigation: ${r.mitigation}`).join('\n');
const okrLines = (b.recommended_okrs||[]).map(o => `  O: ${o.objective}\n  KRs:\n${o.key_results.map(kr => '    - '+kr).join('\n')}`).join('\n\n');
const report = [
  `QUARTERLY PLANNING BRIEF — ${m.quarter}`,
  `Generated: ${m.generated_at}`,
  b.planning_brief_title,
  ``,
  `RECOMMENDED BETS:`,
  betLines,
  ``,
  `MUST DO THIS QUARTER:`,
  (b.must_do_this_quarter||[]).map(i => `  ✓ ${i}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `DEFER:`,
  (b.suggested_deferral||[]).map(i => `  ✗ ${i}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `TRADEOFFS:`,
  (b.tradeoffs||[]).map(t => `  - ${t}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `CAPACITY ALLOCATION: ${b.capacity_allocation?.description}`,
  (b.capacity_allocation?.breakdown||[]).map(br => `  ${br.area}: ${br.pct}%`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `KEY RISKS:`,
  riskLines,
  ``,
  `RECOMMENDED OKRs:`,
  okrLines,
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...($input.first().json), report_text: report } }];

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: {{ $json.meta.quarter }} Planning Brief
parameters.message:
=
{{ $json.report_text }}

Approve and share with leadership | Reject
